svg.title: LLM evaluation platform architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: ETL service, Scheduler service, and Verdict evaluation service, with their respective databases and external data sources.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ETL layer pull data from PowerApps Dataverse?')
sendPrompt('How does the ETL layer pull data from Azure DB?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the use case config table store?')
sendPrompt('How are metrics configs managed across different use cases?')
sendPrompt('What is the schema of the staging table and use case config table in Source DB?')
sendPrompt('How is the cron trigger schedule configured in the scheduler?')
sendPrompt('How is the manual test trigger endpoint designed?')
sendPrompt('How does the Orchestrator read use case config and fan out calls to Verdict?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the unified result table store?')
sendPrompt('What is the request structure for the batch evaluation endpoint?')
sendPrompt('How is the offline single-metric test endpoint designed?')
sendPrompt('How does the EvaluatorRegistry route to different evaluators?')
sendPrompt('What is the schema for eval_log and llm_call_log?')
sendPrompt('How does the frontend dashboard query the Result DB directly?')
sendPrompt('What is the retry and rate-limit strategy when Verdict calls the external LLM API?')
